Bad isolation means your code runs today, breaks in six months, and you can't trace why. Here's what a real data science environment looks like. #DataScience #Python #Shorts", "tags": ["data science", "python tutorial", "virtual environment", "conda", "reproducibility", "python for beginners", "data science setup"]}
